reviews.author: Vignesh M
reviews.title: Go for it!
reviews.body: No concerns after 4 months of usage. The TDS level can be adjusted with some efforts as required. Installation was quick and easy. I regret not purchasing this earlier. Totally value for money! The best filter in this price range. There may be some minor noises for few seconds, other than that it's quiet.

reviews.author: Pushpa
reviews.title: Excellent Water Purifier for Healthy Drinking Water
reviews.body: I am fully satisfied with KENT Supreme Star RO Water Purifier. The quality of water is really clean and tasty. Thanks to its RO+UV+UF filtration, and due to alkaline and copper enrichment technology. This model comes equipped with a digital display indicating water quality and filter conditions, thus, monitoring performance has never been easier. The large 9-liter water capacity and rapid speed of filtration mean that we will always have plenty of water available even in case of a power outage. I especially liked the presence of UV LED technology in the storage tank as it ensures the purity of
